word: H381 - אִישׁ־חַיִל - ʼÎysh-Chayil - eesh-khah'-yil - A valiant man

sections.paragraph:
Original: אישׁ־חי אישׁ־חיל

Transliteration: 'ı̂ysh-chayil 'ı̂ysh-chay

Phonetic: eesh-khah'-yil

BDB Definition:

  1. a mighty man, valiant man

Origin: from H376 and H2428

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
